'''Bruno Verges''' (born 18 November 1975) is a French former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]].<ref>[http://www.slstats.org/p739 in/Bruno+Verges.html Bruno Verges at RLFANS.com]  {{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150702123249/http://www.slstats.org/p739/Bruno%2BVerges.html |date=2 July 2015 }}</ref>
